request.prompt: Browser app UI concept mockup for Neta Companion, version C: one-page ambient companion room. The entire screen is one room composition. Left side contains the 360 gaze character portal embedded into the illustrated desk background, not in a card. Right one third is a vertical FM console attached to the room edge, with stacked playlist, transport controls, mini spectrum, and ON AIR state. Pet-foundry chibi sprite is a draggable desktop mascot layer on top of everything, with a grab handle, position shadow, and reactive state ring. Show pause state specifically: FM console says PAUSED, sprite sits calmly, waveform dimmed, cursor orbit still active on the left. High-end product design mockup, mature playful, warm cream and black with magenta and violet accents, clear hierarchy, no separate tabs, no split landing page, no giant explanation text.
